module_info.docstring: MCP tool handler middleware — timing, error wrapping, metrics.

classes.name: ToolStats
classes.docstring: Snapshot of metrics for a single tool.

classes.name: McpMetrics
classes.docstring: Collects per-tool call metrics for MCP servers.

methods.name: tool_metrics
methods.docstring: Return a snapshot of metrics for all tools.

methods.name: instrument
methods.docstring:
Wrap a tool handler with timing, error counting, and error wrapping.

Args:
    tool_name: The MCP tool name for metric grouping.
    handler: The original handler callable.

Returns:
    Wrapped handler that collects metrics.
